title: Cobblemon: Indigo
description: Adds Gym Leaders, Elite Four and Champion from the Indigo League to Cobblemon
body:
This datapack adds 8 Gym Leaders, an Elite Four and Champion from the Indigo League. 

This was all created through Cobblemon's new data-driven NPC feature, which includes NPC battles and dialogue. This is a very early feature, so please do not contact the Cobblemon team for help creating NPC datapacks. If you're interested, here is a good starting point.

Currently, the NPCs must be spawned using the command /spawnnpc - all NPCs from this datapack start with "indigo", and if they don't appear, you've installed the datapack wrong. Make sure to restart your world before attempting to spawn the NPCs.

All NPC teams are inspired from their teams in Pokemon Let's Go Pikachu/Eevee, as this game is the most modern and has rematches built in. I made a suitable rematch team for Giovanni as he tends to disappear in the games after you beat him.

All NPCs have a tougher rematch team once you have defeated the Elite Four and Champion for the first time. The Gym Leaders have a 24h cooldown, which resets each time you beat them.

## Roadmap
- Think of a good icon
- Add skins for NPCs (PLEASE dm me if you can help with this)
- Configurable cooldowns with scoreboard or something?
- Add naturally generating gyms, perhaps in villages?
